items.title: West Ham star Tomas Soucek carried off after horror injury in Czechia World Cup clash against Mexico
items.summary: CZECHIA star Tomas Soucek suffered a horror injury in a bizarre incident at the World Cup. The West Ham midfielder was attempting to close down record-breaking Mexico goalkeeper Guillermo Ochoa. Horrific live TV images showed the midfield hardman roll his ankle under him, and drop to the floor in ag

items.title: Ochoa and Mora make World Cup history as Mexico down Czech Republic
items.summary: Guillermo Ochoa appeared at a record sixth World Cup and 17-year-old Gilberto Mora shone as the youngest player to start in the competition for 24 years as co-hosts Mexico eliminated Czech Republic with a third consecutive win in Group A.

items.title: World Cup becomes cult of the individual but ignores team complexity | Jonathan Liew
items.summary: The irony of the superstar-heavy narrative is the way it embellishes rather than diminishes importance of the collective “Cristiano Ronaldo’s record-equalling sixth World Cup got off to a disappointing start,” began the Reuters match report of Portugal’s 1-1 draw against the Democratic Republic of t

items.title: Goalkeepers beware: Trionda World Cup ball hits ‘crisis’ point at certain speed
items.summary: Some, like Luca Zidane, have been bamboozled and an academic paper bears out Joe Hart’s opinion about its movement Poor old Luca Zidane. items.title: South Africa 1 South Korea 0: Nightmare result for Scotland leaves World Cup hopes hanging by a thread
items.summary: SCOTLAND were dealt another major blow as South Africa snatched a 1-0 win over South Korea. The shock result saw Bafana Bafana leapfrog South Korea into second behind Group A winners Mexico. Son Heung-min's side had to settle for third. But their record of three points and a -1 goal difference is tw

items.title: South Africa make history by qualifying with win over South Korea
items.summary: South Africa have reached the World Cup knockout rounds for the first time in their history by finishing second in Group A with a 1-0 victory over South Korea.

items.title: What do Scotland need to make World Cup knockouts?
items.summary: After their 3-0 defeat by Brazil, BBC Sport looks at what Scotland require to reach the knockout phase.

items.title: South Africa into round of 32 after win over South Korea
items.summary: Thapelo Maseko's second-half goal gives South Africa a 1-0 win over South Korea in Monterrey, and sends them into the World Cup knockout phase.

items.title: Mexico beat Czech Republic to maintain 100% winning record
items.summary: Mexico score three second-half goals to eliminate the Czech Republic from the World Cup and end the group phase with maximum points.

items.title: 'Typical Scotland': Tartan Army give their verdict on Miami match against Brazil
items.summary: Scotland's hopes of reaching the knockout stages of the World Cup are in peril after Brazil won 3-0 in Miami.

items.title: Fidalgo caps Mexico rout as co-hosts maintain 100% record and send Czechia out
items.summary: There are ways of leaving a tournament. You can go out with a sheen of glory, having gone to-to-toe with a great opponent. items.title: Maseko strike sends South Africa into first World Cup knockouts with win over South Korea
items.summary: South ​Africa celebrated a first World Cup knockout berth with jubilant scenes on Wednesday after Thapelo Maseko’s second-half strike secured a 1-0 victory over South ⁠Korea, who still have a chance of advancing as one of the eight best third-placed teams . items.title: Czechia 0 Mexico 3: Guillermo Ochoa, 40, appears at SIXTH and final World Cup as fans go wild
items.summary: FOOTBALL-MAD Mexico put on a footballing clinic against Czechia to top Group A at the World Cup, as they also handed some late minutes to a World Cup legend. items.title: Stunning viral fan at Colombia vs DR Congo clash revealed as former World Cup star’s daughter
items.summary: A FAN who went viral on social media for her dour expression while watching Colombia's clash with DR Congo has been revealed as a former World Cup star's daughter.
